transcription.text: At Honda, we believe in the power of dreams. Only dreams can turn a pursuit into a mission, passion into positive energy, and teamwork into a work of art. Because once you have a dream, there's no telling how far you can go. That's why Honda is proudly supporting Team USA's Olympic and Paralympic teams.

metadata.title: 2026 Honda Olympics: The Power of Dreams: Pursuit
